backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Higgins Music Hub backend, defining all core data types (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) and integrating authorization, access control, and user approval mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two feature IDs to their associated frontend files, components, and test requirements — covering the portal audit and full Memberships section implementation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Concise per-file summaries of all major frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of hooks, components, and portal detail pages.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive variants.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Timestamped execution log for the Rollout 21.7 build/upgrade deployment, recording pre-deployment checks including TypeScript compilation, backend build, canister upgrade, and post-upgrade verification.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact document for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to store verbatim command outputs and build logs that are too long for the main log file.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth for remaining rollout steps (Steps 10–12), detailing deployment to ICP mainnet, post-launch refinements, and long-term maintenance tasks with acceptance criteria.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and non-admin member access verification.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.3–21.4 of the Higgins Music Hub, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6, mirroring the 21.3–21.4 checklist to verify landing page, auth, five detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for admin and non-admin roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for the rollout 21.7 smoke test, capturing test user principals, entity IDs per route, console errors, and per-role pass/fail outcomes during a February 17, 2026 production test run.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, requiring two full test runs (admin and non-admin), with explicit AuthGate/ApprovalGate verification and references to a companion session log template for recording entity IDs and console output.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive mainnet smoke test checklist for Step 10 deployment, verifying landing page, authentication flows, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin roles on ICP mainnet production.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with all application routes including landing, portal (auth/approval-gated), dashboard, memberships, publishing, releases, recordings, and artist development pages, plus a root error boundary component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Approval gate component that currently bypasses all approval checks and always renders children, with the original approval-check logic preserved in comments for easy reversion.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Guards portal routes by checking Internet Identity authentication state, redirecting unauthenticated users to the landing page and showing a sign-in prompt if identity is absent.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that toggles Internet Identity login/logout, clears the React Query cache on logout, and handles the already-authenticated edge case.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Centered card component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon for unauthorized route access.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Reusable empty-state UI component that displays an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Alert banner that displays error messages, converting known backend error strings like 'Unauthorized' or 'not found' into user-friendly text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Full-screen loading placeholder that renders a set of skeleton elements while content is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: Sticky top header displaying the Higgins Music logo and brand name with navigation to the landing page, and an optional login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Defines the main portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, rendering different nav items based on admin status, and wrapping page content with a brand header.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: A simple outline button component with a link icon used to trigger an edit links action.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: A dialog component for editing related entity links (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) using multi-select lists, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: A filterable, scrollable checklist component for selecting multiple entities from a list of options with a search input.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Provides utility functions to determine if the current user has permission to edit a record or membership by comparing principals, with defensive handling for missing values.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as clickable badges, resolving human-readable labels from caller entities for non-admin users.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: A hook that fetches the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, exposing derived flags like isAdmin and isApproved.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: Custom hook that fetches and formats entity options (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) for linking, returning admin-scoped or caller-scoped data depending on the user's role.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend actor calls, covering user profiles, roles, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for a warm-neutral light/dark color theme used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying a hero section, services overview, and co-operative membership info, with a sign-in button that triggers Internet Identity login and redirects authenticated users to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Admin-only informational page that explains how to bootstrap the first administrator account by appending a secret token to the app URL before signing in.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin dashboard page that displays aggregate counts of memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entries as clickable stat cards, plus a recent activity list and a Rollout 21.7 smoke test helper alert. The admin-only access guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page that lists all known users in a table and allows changing each user's role (admin, member, guest) via a dropdown, using the useAssignCallerUserRole mutation. The admin-only guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry, displaying goals, plans, milestones, and related records, with an edit dialog for updating linked entities (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) gated by ownership/admin permissions.
List page for artist development entries that shows all entries as cards and provides an admin-only dialog form to create new entries with artist ID, goals, plans, milestones, and internal notes.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail view for a single release record, displaying tracklist, key dates, owners, workflow checklist, and related entities, with an edit dialog for updating linked members, artists, works, and projects gated by ownership/admin permissions.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: Displays a list of label releases with loading/empty states and allows admins to create new releases via a dialog form with fields for title, type, tracklist, key dates, and owners.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Shows detailed view of a single membership profile with inline editing of profile fields and status (admin-only), plus a dialog for editing linked entities like artists, works, releases, and projects.
Lists all membership profiles (admins see all, regular users see their own) in a table with status badges, and provides a dialog to create new membership profiles.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Renders the detail view for a single publishing work, supporting notes editing and linking to related entities (members, artists, releases, projects) with permission-based edit controls.
Lists all publishing catalog works with loading/empty states and allows admins to create new works via a dialog form that validates contributor/ownership split parity and totals.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a single recording project, displaying project metadata, participants, and linked entities (members, artists, works, releases) with an edit dialog for admins/owners to manage related record links.
List page for all recording projects, allowing admins to create new projects via a dialog form with title, participants, session date, status, and notes fields.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Utility functions for safe array handling, providing normalization of undefined/null values to empty arrays to ensure upgrade resilience when backend data may be missing fields.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides a single validation function for ownership splits, checking that splits are non-empty and that the total percentage does not exceed 100%.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Manual QA checklist template for smoke-testing upgrade-safe related-record linking across five entity detail pages, covering build status, auth flow, portal routes, and Edit Links dialogs for multiple rollout phases.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA verification checklist for post-canister-upgrade related-record linking across all five portal detail pages, testing Edit Links dialog behavior, save persistence after page refresh, and correct entity scoping for admin vs. non-admin members.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Higgins Music Hub, recording completed features (portal auditing, memberships implementation) and a pending backend wiring task for the Memberships section.
